title: macrotyloma geocarpum var. geocarpum
intro: Macrotyloma geocarpum var. geocarpum, also known as the "ground bean", is a variety of legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Macrotyloma geocarpum var. geocarpum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
